title: Plan-Then-Execute Pattern

problem.en: Agents that plan and execute simultaneously are vulnerable to prompt injection mid-execution.
problem.ko: кі„нҡҚкіј мӢӨн–үмқ„ лҸҷмӢңм—җ мҲҳн–үн•ҳлҠ” м—җмқҙм „нҠёлҠ” мӢӨн–ү мӨ‘ н”„лЎ¬н”„нҠё мқём қм…ҳм—җ м·Ём•Ҫн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

solution.en: Separate planning phase from execution, locking the plan before any untrusted data processing begins.
solution.ko: кі„нҡҚ лӢЁкі„лҘј мӢӨн–үкіј л¶„лҰ¬н•ҳкі , мӢ лў°н•  мҲҳ м—ҶлҠ” лҚ°мқҙн„° мІҳлҰ¬ мӢңмһ‘ м „м—җ кі„нҡҚмқ„ мһ кёүлӢҲлӢӨ.

mermaid_diagram:
flowchart TD
    A[Task] --> B[Planning Phase]
    B -->|Lock Plan| C[Execution Phase]
    C --> D[Result]
    E[Untrusted Data] -->|Cannot modify| B
code_example:
plan = agent.create_plan(task)  # No untrusted data
plan.lock()  # Freeze the plan
for step in plan.steps:
    result = agent.execute(step, untrusted_data)
# Plan cannot be modified during execution

ko: лҸҷм Ғ м Ғмқ‘ м–ҙл ӨмӣҖ
